item.title: Note to all product teams: project code names are not temporary, they are permanent. Like truly eter...
item.description:
Note to all product teams: project code names are not temporary, they are permanent. Like truly eternal.
Choose very very wisely.
--- @nikunj | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 0

item.description:
RT @JanFadayeMeehan: شکیلا به کمک ما احتیاج داره.
"روز بیست و نهم": تا روز آزادی ات، هر روز صدای تو خواهم بود.
"Day 29": I will be you…

item.description:
Great launches recently. Time for temperature check!
Based on what you've read, which of these 2 are you going to be using as your "main" coding model going forward?
